name: Healthway Medical Corporation Limited
summary: Healthway Medical Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare management services primarily in Singapore and China. The company operates in two segments, Primary Healthcare and Specialist Healthcare. The Primary Healthcare segment offers services in family medicine, dentistry, and healthcare benefit management areas, as well as invests in strategic medical related business. The Specialist Healthcare segment provides services in the areas of pediatrics, orthopedics, aesthetic medicine, obstetrics, and gynecology; and cardiology, gastroenterology, psychiatry, ophthalmology, otorhinolaryngology, and general surgery. The company also provides managed healthcare, medical, and consultancy services; and sells drugs and medical supplies. It owns, operates, and manages 89 clinics and medical centers. Healthway Medical Corporation Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Singapore.
